trans-unit.resname: %name% has not been tagged in any photos yet.
trans-unit.source: %name% has not been tagged in any photos yet.
trans-unit.target: %name% is nog in geen enkele foto getagd.

trans-unit.resname: %name% is currently editing this activity (last active %time%).
trans-unit.source: %name% is currently editing this activity (last active %time%).
trans-unit.target: %name% bewerkt deze activiteit op dit moment (laatst actief %time%).

trans-unit.resname: A new draft was created. Edit it and submit again.
trans-unit.source: A new draft was created. Edit it and submit again.
trans-unit.target: Er is een nieuw concept aangemaakt. Bewerk het en dien het opnieuw in.

trans-unit.resname: A sign-up list with existing sign-ups was changed in this revision, so the live sign-ups cannot be carried over and it can no longer be submitted or approved.
trans-unit.source: A sign-up list with existing sign-ups was changed in this revision, so the live sign-ups cannot be carried over and it can no longer be submitted or approved.
trans-unit.target: Een inschrijflijst met bestaande inschrijvingen is in deze revisie gewijzigd, waardoor de bestaande inschrijvingen niet kunnen worden meegenomen en deze niet meer kan worden ingediend of goedgekeurd.

trans-unit.resname: Active Member - Authenticated member and in an organ
trans-unit.source: Active Member - Authenticated member and in an organ
trans-unit.target: Actief lid - Geauthenticeerd lid en in een orgaan

trans-unit.resname: Activity saved as a draft. Submit it for review when you are ready.
trans-unit.source: Activity saved as a draft. Submit it for review when you are ready.
trans-unit.target: Activiteit opgeslagen als concept. Dien het ter beoordeling in wanneer je er klaar voor bent.

trans-unit.resname: Administrators and board members must enable multi-factor authentication before accessing privileged pages. Confirm your password below to continue to the MFA setup screen.
trans-unit.source: Administrators and board members must enable multi-factor authentication before accessing privileged pages. Confirm your password below to continue to the MFA setup screen.
trans-unit.target: Beheerders en bestuursleden moeten tweestapsverificatie inschakelen voordat zij bevoegde pagina's kunnen openen. Bevestig hieronder je wachtwoord om door te gaan naar het instelscherm.

trans-unit.resname: Admit people by hand with the toggles below.
trans-unit.source: Admit people by hand with the toggles below.
trans-unit.target: Laat mensen handmatig toe met de schakelaars hieronder.

trans-unit.resname: All sessions - including this one - will be terminated immediately. You will be redirected to the login page.
trans-unit.source: All sessions - including this one - will be terminated immediately. You will be redirected to the login page.
trans-unit.target: Alle sessies - inclusief deze - worden onmiddellijk beëindigen. Je wordt doorgestuurd naar de inlogpagina.

trans-unit.resname: All sessions except this one will be signed out immediately.
trans-unit.source: All sessions except this one will be signed out immediately.
trans-unit.target: Alle sessies, behalve deze, worden onmiddellijk beëindigd.

trans-unit.resname: Almost there! Check your email to confirm your sign-up.
trans-unit.source: Almost there! Check your email to confirm your sign-up.
trans-unit.target: Je bent er bijna! Kijk even in je e-mail om je aanmelding te bevestigen.

trans-unit.resname: Anonymous visitors will no longer see this photo on the front page. Logged-in members still see it.
trans-unit.source: Anonymous visitors will no longer see this photo on the front page. Logged-in members still see it.
trans-unit.target: Anonieme bezoekers zien deze foto niet meer op de voorpagina. Ingelogde leden blijven hem zien.

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to delete the selected photos? This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete the selected photos? This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je de geselecteerde foto's wilt verwijderen? Dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to delete this album?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this album?
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je dit album wilt verwijderen?

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to terminate the session on this device?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to terminate the session on this device?
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je de sessie op dit apparaat wilt beëindigen?

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from this sign-up list?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from this sign-up list?
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je je wilt uitschrijven van deze inschrijflijst?

trans-unit.resname: Attendance can only be marked from 30 minutes before the activity until a day after it ends.
trans-unit.source: Attendance can only be marked from 30 minutes before the activity until a day after it ends.
trans-unit.target: Aanwezigheid kan alleen worden geregistreerd vanaf 30 minuten voor de activiteit tot een dag na afloop.

trans-unit.resname: Backup codes are shown only at generation time. Regenerate to obtain a new set.
trans-unit.source: Backup codes are shown only at generation time. Regenerate to obtain a new set.
trans-unit.target: Back-upcodes worden alleen weergegeven op het moment dat ze worden aangemaakt. Genereer ze opnieuw om een nieuwe set te krijgen.

trans-unit.resname: Backup codes have already been shown. Regenerate to get a new set.
trans-unit.source: Backup codes have already been shown. Regenerate to get a new set.
trans-unit.target: De back-upcodes zijn al weergegeven. Genereer nieuwe back-upcodes om een nieuwe set te krijgen.

trans-unit.resname: Backup codes regenerated. The previous codes are no longer valid.
trans-unit.source: Backup codes regenerated. The previous codes are no longer valid.
trans-unit.target: De back-upcodes zijn opnieuw gegenereerd. De vorige back-upcodes zijn niet langer geldig.

trans-unit.resname: Cancel this activity? It stays visible with a [CANCELLED] notice, but all sign-ups, edits and withdrawals are frozen.
trans-unit.source: Cancel this activity? It stays visible with a [CANCELLED] notice, but all sign-ups, edits and withdrawals are frozen.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit annuleren? Ze blijft zichtbaar met een [GEANNULEERD]-melding, maar alle inschrijvingen, wijzigingen en uitschrijvingen worden bevroren.

trans-unit.resname: Career Development and External Affairs Officer
trans-unit.source: Career Development and External Affairs Officer

trans-unit.resname: Changes saved. Submit the revision for review when you are ready.
trans-unit.source: Changes saved. Submit the revision for review when you are ready.
trans-unit.target: Wijzigingen opgeslagen. Dien de revisie ter beoordeling in wanneer je er klaar voor bent.

trans-unit.resname: Click or tap the photo where the person is
trans-unit.source: Click or tap the photo where the person is
trans-unit.target: Klik of tik op de foto waar de persoon staat

trans-unit.resname: Click the button below to confirm your sign-up for this activity.
trans-unit.source: Click the button below to confirm your sign-up for this activity.
trans-unit.target: Klik op de knop hieronder om je inschrijving voor deze activiteit te bevestigen.

trans-unit.resname: Devices where your account is currently signed in. If you notice an unrecognised device or location, terminate that session immediately and consider changing your password.
trans-unit.source: Devices where your account is currently signed in. If you notice an unrecognised device or location, terminate that session immediately and consider changing your password.
trans-unit.target: Apparaten waarop je momenteel bent ingelogd. Als je een onbekend apparaat of een onbekende locatie opmerkt, beëindig dan onmiddellijk die sessie af en overweeg om je wachtwoord te wijzigen.

trans-unit.resname: Did not receive the confirmation email? Resend it.
trans-unit.source: Did not receive the confirmation email? Resend it.
trans-unit.target: Heb je de bevestigingsmail niet ontvangen? Verstuur hem opnieuw.

trans-unit.resname: Disable MFA on your account? Your existing TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded.
trans-unit.source: Disable MFA on your account? Your existing TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded.
trans-unit.target: Wil je MFA voor je account uitschakelen? Je huidige TOTP-code en back-upcodes worden dan verwijderd.

trans-unit.resname: Discard this draft to return to the live version, then revise it again without changing that list.
trans-unit.source: Discard this draft to return to the live version, then revise it again without changing that list.
trans-unit.target: Gooi dit concept weg om terug te keren naar de live versie en herzie deze vervolgens opnieuw zonder die lijst te wijzigen.

trans-unit.resname: Discard this draft to return to the live version.
trans-unit.source: Discard this draft to return to the live version.
trans-unit.target: Gooi dit concept weg om terug te keren naar de live versie.

trans-unit.resname: Do you have a GEWIS account?
trans-unit.source: Do you have a GEWIS account?

trans-unit.resname: Draft discarded; the activity was reverted to its live version.
trans-unit.source: Draft discarded; the activity was reverted to its live version.
trans-unit.target: Concept weggegooid; de activiteit is teruggezet naar de live versie.

trans-unit.resname: Drag photos here or click to select
trans-unit.source: Drag photos here or click to select
trans-unit.target: Sleep foto's hierheen of klik om te selecteren
Loten na geopend te zijn geweest (uren)

trans-unit.resname: Draw after being open for a while
trans-unit.source: Draw after being open for a while
trans-unit.target: Loten nadat de lijst een tijd open is geweest

trans-unit.resname: Draw if full before a date
trans-unit.source: Draw if full before a date
trans-unit.target: Loten als vol vóór een datum

trans-unit.resname: Enable Dutch and/or English and fill in the fields below. At least one language must be used.
trans-unit.source: Enable Dutch and/or English and fill in the fields below. At least one language must be used.
trans-unit.target: Schakel Nederlands en/of Engels in en vul de velden hieronder in. Er moet minstens één taal worden gebruikt.

trans-unit.resname: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.
trans-unit.source: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.
trans-unit.target: Voer een 6-cijferige verificatiecode of een 16-tekens lange back-upcode in kleine letters (hexadecimaal) in.

trans-unit.resname: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your saved backup codes.
trans-unit.source: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your saved backup codes.
trans-unit.target: Voer de 6-cijferige code in die je in je authenticator-app hebt ontvangen, of een van je opgeslagen back-upcodes.

trans-unit.resname: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app to confirm the link.
trans-unit.source: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app to confirm the link.
trans-unit.target: Voer de 6-cijferige code in die in de app wordt weergegeven om de koppeling te bevestigen.

trans-unit.resname: Enter the email address you signed up with and we will send you a new confirmation link.
trans-unit.source: Enter the email address you signed up with and we will send you a new confirmation link.
trans-unit.target: Voer het e-mailadres in waarmee je je hebt aangemeld, dan sturen we je een nieuwe bevestigingslink.

trans-unit.resname: Every active session for this user will be terminated immediately.
trans-unit.source: Every active session for this user will be terminated immediately.
trans-unit.target: Alle actieve sessies van deze gebruiker worden direct beëindigd.

trans-unit.resname: Every input should map to an output. This one got lost.
trans-unit.source: Every input should map to an output. This one got lost.
trans-unit.target: Elke invoer moet een uitvoer als beeld hebben. Deze is verloren gegaan.

trans-unit.resname: Explain how you addressed the feedback before resubmitting.
trans-unit.source: Explain how you addressed the feedback before resubmitting.
trans-unit.target: Leg uit hoe je de feedback hebt verwerkt voordat je opnieuw indient.
URL van het beleid van de externe partij
Wie het eerst komt, het eerst maalt

trans-unit.resname: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password and a verification code. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.source: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password and a verification code. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Voor jouw veiligheid moet je bij gevoelige handelingen opnieuw je wachtwoord en een verificatiecode invoeren. Deze bevestiging blijft 10 minuten geldig.

trans-unit.resname: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.source: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Voor jouw veiligheid moet je bij gevoelige handelingen opnieuw je wachtwoord invoeren. Deze bevestiging blijft 10 minuten geldig.

trans-unit.resname: GEWIS uses functional cookies to make the website function and analytical cookies to provide you with an optimal user experience. If you do not want analytical cookies, you can opt out below.
trans-unit.source: GEWIS uses functional cookies to make the website function and analytical cookies to provide you with an optimal user experience. If you do not want analytical cookies, you can opt out below.
trans-unit.target: GEWIS gebruikt functionele cookies om de website te laten functioneren en analytische cookies om u een optimale gebruikerservaring te bieden. Als u geen analytische cookies wilt, kunt u zich hieronder afmelden.

trans-unit.resname: Guest - Anyone who can access the website
trans-unit.source: Guest - Anyone who can access the website
trans-unit.target: Gast - Iedereen die toegang heeft tot de website

trans-unit.resname: Have a GEWIS account? Log in to sign up.
trans-unit.source: Have a GEWIS account? Log in to sign up.
trans-unit.target: Heb je een GEWIS-account? Log in om je in te schrijven.

trans-unit.resname: If a pending sign-up exists for this email address, we have sent a new confirmation link.
trans-unit.source: If a pending sign-up exists for this email address, we have sent a new confirmation link.
trans-unit.target: Als er een aanmelding in behandeling is voor dit e-mailadres, hebben we een nieuwe bevestigingslink gestuurd.

trans-unit.resname: If there is an account associated with your email address, an email has just been sent containing a link that will allow you to reset your password. If you do not receive an email, please check your spam folder or try again later.
trans-unit.source: If there is an account associated with your email address, an email has just been sent containing a link that will allow you to reset your password. If you do not receive an email, please check your spam folder or try again later.
trans-unit.target: Als er een account aan jouw e-mailadres is gekoppeld, is er zojuist een e-mail verzonden met een link waarmee je jouw wachtwoord kunt resetten. Als je geen e-mail ontvangt, controleer dan jouw spamfolder of probeer het later nog eens.

trans-unit.resname: If this keeps occurring, please contact the Application Management Committee and let us know what you were doing when this error occurred. We will fix it as soon as possible.
trans-unit.source: If this keeps occurring, please contact the Application Management Committee and let us know what you were doing when this error occurred. We will fix it as soon as possible.
trans-unit.target: Als deze fout zich blijft voordoen, neem dan contact op met de ApplicatieBeheerCommissie en laat ons weten wat je aan het doen was toen deze fout optrad. We zullen het zo snel mogelijk oplossen.

trans-unit.resname: If you entered a backup code, try the next unused one from your saved list. Each backup code works only once.
trans-unit.source: If you entered a backup code, try the next unused one from your saved list. Each backup code works only once.
trans-unit.target: Als je een back-upcode hebt ingevoerd, probeer dan de volgende ongebruikte back-upcode uit je lijst met opgeslagen back-upcodes. Elke back-upcode kan maar één keer worden gebruikt.

trans-unit.resname: Improve security by signing out of other devices.
trans-unit.source: Improve security by signing out of other devices.
trans-unit.target: Verhoog de veiligheid door je op andere apparaten af te melden.

trans-unit.resname: Install an authenticator app such as Ente Auth or 2FAS on your phone.
trans-unit.source: Install an authenticator app such as Ente Auth or 2FAS on your phone.
trans-unit.target: Installeer een authenticatie-app zoals Ente Auth of 2FAS op je telefoon.

trans-unit.resname: It exists only in the complex plane of wishful thinking.
trans-unit.source: It exists only in the complex plane of wishful thinking.
trans-unit.target: Het bestaat alleen in het complexe vlak van wensdenken.

trans-unit.resname: It is getting closer... but it will never quite get there.
trans-unit.source: It is getting closer... but it will never quite get there.
trans-unit.target: Het komt steeds dichterbij... maar het zal er nooit helemaal komen.

trans-unit.resname: It is pointing somewhere. Just not here.
trans-unit.source: It is pointing somewhere. Just not here.
trans-unit.target: Het verwijst ergens naar. Alleen niet hier.

trans-unit.resname: It was declared, but never initialised.
trans-unit.source: It was declared, but never initialised.
trans-unit.target: Het werd gedeclareerd, maar nooit geïnitialiseerd.

trans-unit.resname: Its sub-albums and photos are deleted as well. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: Its sub-albums and photos are deleted as well. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: De subalbums en foto's worden ook verwijderd. Dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.

trans-unit.resname: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC, up to 32 MB each.
trans-unit.source: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC, up to 32 MB each.
trans-unit.target: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF of HEIC, maximaal 32 MB per stuk.
Log in om je in te schrijven
Log in om je in te schrijven.

trans-unit.resname: Log in to view the subscribers.
trans-unit.source: Log in to view the subscribers.
trans-unit.target: Log in om de inschrijvingen te bekijken.

trans-unit.resname: MFA enabled. Save your backup codes now - they will not be shown again.
trans-unit.source: MFA enabled. Save your backup codes now - they will not be shown again.
trans-unit.target: MFA is ingeschakeld. Sla je back-upcodes nu op - ze worden daarna niet meer weergegeven.

trans-unit.resname: MFA reset and all sessions terminated.
trans-unit.source: MFA reset and all sessions terminated.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie hersteld en alle sessies beëindigd.

trans-unit.resname: Made with <3 by the ApplicatieBeheerCommissie and Web Commissie (2013 - 2022).
trans-unit.source: Made with <3 by the ApplicatieBeheerCommissie and Web Commissie (2013 - 2022).
trans-unit.target: Met <3 gemaakt door de ApplicatieBeheerCommissie en Web Commissie (2013 - 2022).

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication adds a second step at login: in addition to your password, you enter a time-based code from an authenticator app.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication adds a second step at login: in addition to your password, you enter a time-based code from an authenticator app.
trans-unit.target: Bij multi-factor authenticatie wordt er een tweede stap toegevoegd bij het inloggen: naast je wachtwoord voer je een tijdgebonden code in uit een authenticatie-app.

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication cannot be disabled while it is required for your role.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication cannot be disabled while it is required for your role.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie kan niet worden uitgeschakeld zolang deze voor jouw rol verplicht is.

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication is not enabled for this user.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication is not enabled for this user.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie is niet ingeschakeld voor deze gebruiker.

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication is required for your role. Privileged actions are unavailable until you enable it.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication is required for your role. Privileged actions are unavailable until you enable it.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie is verplicht voor jouw rol. Bevoegde acties zijn niet beschikbaar totdat je het inschakelt.

trans-unit.resname: No activities match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No activities match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen activiteiten voldoen aan de huidige filters.

trans-unit.resname: No company users match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No company users match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen bedrijfsgebruikers voldoen aan de huidige filters.

trans-unit.resname: No members match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No members match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen leden voldoen aan de huidige filters.

trans-unit.resname: No one is tagged in this photo yet
trans-unit.source: No one is tagged in this photo yet
trans-unit.target: Er is nog niemand getagd op deze foto

trans-unit.resname: No photo of the week has been chosen yet.
trans-unit.source: No photo of the week has been chosen yet.
trans-unit.target: Er is nog geen foto van de week gekozen.

trans-unit.resname: No photo of the week has been chosen yet. It is picked automatically every Monday from the past week's votes.
trans-unit.source: No photo of the week has been chosen yet. It is picked automatically every Monday from the past week's votes.
trans-unit.target: Er is nog geen foto van de week gekozen. Deze wordt elke maandag automatisch gekozen op basis van de stemmen van de afgelopen week.

trans-unit.resname: No vacancies match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No vacancies match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen vacatures voldoen aan de huidige filters.
Oh nee! Er is iets misgegaan :(

trans-unit.resname: On Thursdays, there is a %link_start%social drink%link_end% from 16.30 to 19.00.
trans-unit.source: On Thursdays, there is a %link_start%social drink%link_end% from 16.30 to 19.00.
trans-unit.target: Donderdags is er een %link_start%borrel%link_end% van 16.30 tot 19.00.

trans-unit.resname: Optional. A sign-up list with subscribers can no longer be changed structurally.
trans-unit.source: Optional. A sign-up list with subscribers can no longer be changed structurally.
trans-unit.target: Optioneel. Een inschrijflijst met inschrijvingen kan niet meer structureel worden gewijzigd.

trans-unit.resname: Or enter this secret in your app manually:
trans-unit.source: Or enter this secret in your app manually:
trans-unit.target: Of voer deze geheime sleutel handmatig in je app in:

trans-unit.resname: Payment is collected by the external party
trans-unit.source: Payment is collected by the external party
trans-unit.target: Betaling wordt door de externe partij geïnd

trans-unit.resname: Pick a long, unique password - at least 16 characters and not found in any known data breach.
trans-unit.source: Pick a long, unique password - at least 16 characters and not found in any known data breach.
trans-unit.target: Kies een lang, uniek wachtwoord - minimaal 16 tekens lang en niet voorkomend in bekende datalekken.

trans-unit.resname: Places are allocated by a draw on %date%.
trans-unit.source: Places are allocated by a draw on %date%.
trans-unit.target: Plekken worden verdeeld via een loting op %date%.

trans-unit.resname: Please complete the verification again and resubmit.
trans-unit.source: Please complete the verification again and resubmit.
trans-unit.target: Voltooi de verificatie opnieuw en verstuur nogmaals.

trans-unit.resname: Please contact %organizer% or the board (%email%) with any questions or concerns. Have fun!
trans-unit.source: Please contact %organizer% or the board (%email%) with any questions or concerns. Have fun!
trans-unit.target: Neem contact op met %organizer% of het bestuur (%email%) bij vragen of opmerkingen. Veel plezier!

trans-unit.resname: Please provide both a subject and a message.
trans-unit.source: Please provide both a subject and a message.
trans-unit.target: Geef zowel een onderwerp als een bericht op.

trans-unit.resname: Re-publish this activity? It becomes publicly visible again and sign-ups reopen where the deadlines still allow.
trans-unit.source: Re-publish this activity? It becomes publicly visible again and sign-ups reopen where the deadlines still allow.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit opnieuw publiceren? Ze wordt weer openbaar zichtbaar en inschrijvingen gaan weer open waar de deadlines dat nog toelaten.

trans-unit.resname: Reality collapsed. Please go back before the singularity spreads.
trans-unit.source: Reality collapsed. Please go back before the singularity spreads.
trans-unit.target: De werkelijkheid stortte in. Ga alsjeblieft terug voordat de singulariteit zich verspreidt.

trans-unit.resname: Regenerate backup codes? Any codes you previously saved will stop working.
trans-unit.source: Regenerate backup codes? Any codes you previously saved will stop working.
trans-unit.target: Back-upcodes opnieuw genereren? Alle back-upcodes die je eerder hebt opgeslagen, werken dan niet meer.

trans-unit.resname: Reject it or request changes so it can be revised again from the live version.
trans-unit.source: Reject it or request changes so it can be revised again from the live version.
trans-unit.target: Verwerp deze of vraag wijzigingen aan zodat deze opnieuw vanaf de live versie kan worden herzien.

trans-unit.resname: Reject or close it to clear the queue.
trans-unit.source: Reject or close it to clear the queue.
trans-unit.target: Wijs het af of sluit het om de wachtrij op te schonen.

trans-unit.resname: Required to request changes or reject.
trans-unit.source: Required to request changes or reject.
trans-unit.target: Verplicht om wijzigingen te vragen of af te wijzen.

trans-unit.resname: Run the draw now? This admits people up to capacity and it cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: Run the draw now? This admits people up to capacity and it cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Voer de loting nu uit? Hiermee worden mensen tot de capaciteit toegelaten en dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.

trans-unit.resname: Running the draw admits people up to capacity and locks it; you can adjust individuals afterwards.
trans-unit.source: Running the draw admits people up to capacity and locks it; you can adjust individuals afterwards.
trans-unit.target: De loting laat mensen toe tot de capaciteit en vergrendelt deze; daarna kun je individuen aanpassen.

trans-unit.resname: Save them now: write them down, print this page, or store them in a secure place. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. When you regenerate, all previous codes are invalidated.
trans-unit.source: Save them now: write them down, print this page, or store them in a secure place. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. When you regenerate, all previous codes are invalidated.
trans-unit.target: Bewaar ze nu: schrijf ze op, druk deze pagina af of bewaar ze op een veilige plek. Elke code kan één keer worden gebruikt voor het geval je geen toegang meer hebt tot je authenticator-app. Wanneer je nieuwe codes genereert, worden alle eerdere codes ongeldig.

trans-unit.resname: Search by company, representative name, or email
trans-unit.source: Search by company, representative name, or email
trans-unit.target: Zoek op bedrijf, vertegenwoordiger of e-mail

trans-unit.resname: Search by name or membership number
trans-unit.source: Search by name or membership number

trans-unit.resname: Search for a name or email
trans-unit.source: Search for a name or email

trans-unit.resname: Segmentation fault while accessing this page
trans-unit.source: Segmentation fault while accessing this page
trans-unit.target: Segmentatiefout bij het openen van deze pagina

trans-unit.resname: Select photos and a destination album to move them.
trans-unit.source: Select photos and a destination album to move them.
trans-unit.target: Selecteer foto's en een doelalbum om ze te verplaatsen.

trans-unit.resname: Sensitive (only visible to the board and organiser)
trans-unit.source: Sensitive (only visible to the board and organiser)
trans-unit.target: Gevoelig (alleen zichtbaar voor het bestuur en de organisator)

trans-unit.resname: Show the number of sign-ups to logged-out visitors
trans-unit.source: Show the number of sign-ups to logged-out visitors
trans-unit.target: Toon het aantal inschrijvingen aan uitgelogde bezoekers

trans-unit.resname: Sign-ups are closed and no further changes can be made.
trans-unit.source: Sign-ups are closed and no further changes can be made.
trans-unit.target: Inschrijvingen zijn gesloten en er kunnen geen wijzigingen meer worden gemaakt.

trans-unit.resname: Sign-ups are closed because this activity has been cancelled.
trans-unit.source: Sign-ups are closed because this activity has been cancelled.
trans-unit.target: Inschrijvingen zijn gesloten omdat deze activiteit is geannuleerd.

trans-unit.resname: Sign-ups are frozen for this activity, so you cannot add a subscriber.
trans-unit.source: Sign-ups are frozen for this activity, so you cannot add a subscriber.
trans-unit.target: Inschrijvingen voor deze activiteit zijn bevroren, dus je kunt geen deelnemer toevoegen.

trans-unit.resname: Someone is currently editing this activity.
trans-unit.source: Someone is currently editing this activity.
trans-unit.target: Iemand bewerkt deze activiteit op dit moment.

trans-unit.resname: Someone with this email address is already signed up for this list.
trans-unit.source: Someone with this email address is already signed up for this list.
trans-unit.target: Er is al iemand met dit e-mailadres aangemeld voor deze lijst.

trans-unit.resname: TOTP-based MFA is active on your account.
trans-unit.source: TOTP-based MFA is active on your account.
trans-unit.target: MFA op basis van TOTP is ingeschakeld voor je account.

trans-unit.resname: TU/e Guest - Anyone who can access the website from within the TU/e
trans-unit.source: TU/e Guest - Anyone who can access the website from within the TU/e
trans-unit.target: TU/e gast - Iedereen die toegang heeft tot de website vanuit de TU/e

trans-unit.resname: That action is not available for this revision.
trans-unit.source: That action is not available for this revision.
trans-unit.target: Die actie is niet beschikbaar voor deze revisie.

trans-unit.resname: That device will be signed out immediately.
trans-unit.source: That device will be signed out immediately.

trans-unit.resname: That recipient group is not available for this sign-up list.
trans-unit.source: That recipient group is not available for this sign-up list.
trans-unit.target: Die ontvangersgroep is niet beschikbaar voor deze inschrijflijst.

trans-unit.resname: The GEWIS website is open-source! Check out the repository on  GitHub. Or visit our organisation for more of our awesome open-source projects.
trans-unit.source: The GEWIS website is open-source! Check out the repository on  GitHub. Or visit our organisation for more of our awesome open-source projects.
trans-unit.target: De GEWIS-website is open source! Bekijk de repository op  GitHub. Of bezoek onze organisatie voor meer van onze geweldige open-sourceprojecten.

trans-unit.resname: The activity has been unpublished and is no longer publicly visible.
trans-unit.source: The activity has been unpublished and is no longer publicly visible.
trans-unit.target: De activiteit is gedepubliceerd en is niet langer openbaar zichtbaar.

trans-unit.resname: The activity is no longer cancelled.
trans-unit.source: The activity is no longer cancelled.
trans-unit.target: De activiteit is niet langer geannuleerd.

trans-unit.resname: The album cover is being regenerated.
trans-unit.source: The album cover is being regenerated.

trans-unit.resname: The changes in this draft will be lost and the activity will return to its live version.
trans-unit.source: The changes in this draft will be lost and the activity will return to its live version.
trans-unit.target: De wijzigingen in dit concept gaan verloren en de activiteit keert terug naar de live versie.

trans-unit.resname: The draw can be run once sign-up has closed.
trans-unit.source: The draw can be run once sign-up has closed.
trans-unit.target: De loting kan worden uitgevoerd zodra de inschrijving is gesloten.

trans-unit.resname: The draw could not be run — the list may have changed or was already drawn.
trans-unit.source: The draw could not be run — the list may have changed or was already drawn.
trans-unit.target: De loting kon niet worden uitgevoerd — de lijst is mogelijk gewijzigd of was al geloot.

trans-unit.resname: The draw will be performed automatically on %date%.
trans-unit.source: The draw will be performed automatically on %date%.
trans-unit.target: De loting wordt automatisch uitgevoerd op %date%.

trans-unit.resname: The draw will be performed automatically within a few minutes.
trans-unit.source: The draw will be performed automatically within a few minutes.
trans-unit.target: De loting wordt binnen enkele minuten automatisch uitgevoerd.

trans-unit.resname: The external party dictates the order of admissions
trans-unit.source: The external party dictates the order of admissions
trans-unit.target: De externe partij bepaalt de volgorde van toelating

trans-unit.resname: The external subscriber has been added.
trans-unit.source: The external subscriber has been added.

trans-unit.resname: The photo of the week can only be hidden on Monday morning, before noon.
trans-unit.source: The photo of the week can only be hidden on Monday morning, before noon.
trans-unit.target: De foto van de week kan alleen op maandagochtend, voor het middaguur, worden verborgen.

trans-unit.resname: The photo of the week has been hidden.
trans-unit.source: The photo of the week has been hidden.
trans-unit.target: De foto van de week is verborgen.

trans-unit.resname: The selected recipients will receive this email immediately. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: The selected recipients will receive this email immediately. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: De geselecteerde ontvangers ontvangen deze e-mail direct. Dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.

trans-unit.resname: The start date of this activity has passed, so it can no longer be published. Move it to a future date before it can be submitted again.
trans-unit.source: The start date of this activity has passed, so it can no longer be published. Move it to a future date before it can be submitted again.
trans-unit.target: De startdatum van deze activiteit is verstreken, dus deze kan niet meer worden gepubliceerd. Verplaats deze naar een datum in de toekomst voordat deze opnieuw kan worden ingediend.

trans-unit.resname: The subscriber is added immediately, without email verification.
trans-unit.source: The subscriber is added immediately, without email verification.
trans-unit.target: De inschrijver wordt direct toegevoegd, zonder e-mailverificatie.

trans-unit.resname: Their TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded and every active session for the user will be terminated. Use this when a device has been lost or compromised.
trans-unit.source: Their TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded and every active session for the user will be terminated. Use this when a device has been lost or compromised.
trans-unit.target: Hun TOTP-geheim en back-upcodes worden weggegooid en alle actieve sessies van de gebruiker worden beëindigd. Gebruik dit wanneer een apparaat verloren of gecompromitteerd is.

trans-unit.resname: There are currently no companies to display.
trans-unit.source: There are currently no companies to display.
trans-unit.target: Er zijn momenteel geen bedrijven om weer te geven.

trans-unit.resname: There are no albums to show.
trans-unit.source: There are no albums to show.
trans-unit.target: Er zijn geen albums om weer te geven.

trans-unit.resname: There are no recipients in the selected group.
trans-unit.source: There are no recipients in the selected group.
trans-unit.target: Er zijn geen ontvangers in de geselecteerde groep.

trans-unit.resname: There is nothing to review right now.
trans-unit.source: There is nothing to review right now.
trans-unit.target: Er is op dit moment niets om te beoordelen.
Deze activiteit kan niet worden geannuleerd.
Deze activiteit kan niet worden gedepubliceerd.

trans-unit.resname: This activity has already taken place and can no longer be revised.
trans-unit.source: This activity has already taken place and can no longer be revised.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit heeft al plaatsgevonden en kan niet meer worden herzien.

trans-unit.resname: This activity has already taken place, so this revision can no longer be submitted or approved.
trans-unit.source: This activity has already taken place, so this revision can no longer be submitted or approved.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit heeft al plaatsgevonden, dus deze revisie kan niet meer worden ingediend of goedgekeurd.

trans-unit.resname: This activity has been cancelled. Un-cancel it first to revise it.
trans-unit.source: This activity has been cancelled. Un-cancel it first to revise it.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit is geannuleerd. Maak de annulering eerst ongedaan om ze te herzien.

trans-unit.resname: This activity has been cancelled. Your sign-up is frozen and cannot be changed.
trans-unit.source: This activity has been cancelled. Your sign-up is frozen and cannot be changed.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit is geannuleerd. Je inschrijving is bevroren en kan niet worden gewijzigd.

trans-unit.resname: This activity has no sign-up lists.
trans-unit.source: This activity has no sign-up lists.

trans-unit.resname: This activity is being reviewed and cannot be edited right now.
trans-unit.source: This activity is being reviewed and cannot be edited right now.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit wordt beoordeeld en kan op dit moment niet worden bewerkt.

trans-unit.resname: This activity is cancelled or unpublished, so sign-up actions are frozen.
trans-unit.source: This activity is cancelled or unpublished, so sign-up actions are frozen.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit is geannuleerd of gedepubliceerd, dus inschrijfacties zijn bevroren.

trans-unit.resname: This activity is no longer open for sign-ups, so it cannot be confirmed.
trans-unit.source: This activity is no longer open for sign-ups, so it cannot be confirmed.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit is niet langer open voor inschrijvingen, dus ze kan niet worden bevestigd.

trans-unit.resname: This activity needs a GEFLITST member to take photos
trans-unit.source: This activity needs a GEFLITST member to take photos
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit heeft een GEFLITST-lid nodig om foto’s te maken

trans-unit.resname: This activity needs a Zettle for payments
trans-unit.source: This activity needs a Zettle for payments
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit heeft een Zettle nodig voor betalingen

trans-unit.resname: This activity was closed by the board and can no longer be revised.
trans-unit.source: This activity was closed by the board and can no longer be revised.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit is door het bestuur gesloten en kan niet meer worden herzien.

trans-unit.resname: This activity was taken over by a reviewer, so your changes were not saved.
trans-unit.source: This activity was taken over by a reviewer, so your changes were not saved.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit is overgenomen door een beoordelaar, dus je wijzigingen zijn niet opgeslagen.

trans-unit.resname: This album does not contain any photos yet. Upload some above.
trans-unit.source: This album does not contain any photos yet. Upload some above.
trans-unit.target: Dit album bevat nog geen foto's. Upload er hierboven enkele.

trans-unit.resname: This album does not contain any photos.
trans-unit.source: This album does not contain any photos.

trans-unit.target: Dit concept kan niet worden weggegooid.

trans-unit.resname: This is the first revision; nothing to compare against.
trans-unit.source: This is the first revision; nothing to compare against.
trans-unit.target: Dit is de eerste revisie; er is niets om mee te vergelijken.

trans-unit.resname: This is the only time these codes will be shown.
trans-unit.source: This is the only time these codes will be shown.
trans-unit.target: Dit is de enige keer dat deze codes worden weergegeven.

trans-unit.resname: This page has been divided by zero
trans-unit.source: This page has been divided by zero
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina is gedeeld door nul

trans-unit.resname: This page is NP-hard to locate
trans-unit.source: This page is NP-hard to locate
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina is NP-hard te vinden

trans-unit.resname: This page is a dangling pointer
trans-unit.source: This page is a dangling pointer
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina is een dangling pointer

trans-unit.resname: This page is asymptotically approaching existence
trans-unit.source: This page is asymptotically approaching existence
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina nadert asymptotisch zijn bestaan

trans-unit.resname: This revision was changed elsewhere; reload the page and try again.
trans-unit.source: This revision was changed elsewhere; reload the page and try again.
trans-unit.target: Deze revisie is elders gewijzigd; herlaad de pagina en probeer het opnieuw.

trans-unit.resname: This sign-up list is closed, so your sign-up can no longer be changed.
trans-unit.source: This sign-up list is closed, so your sign-up can no longer be changed.
trans-unit.target: Deze inschrijflijst is gesloten, dus je inschrijving kan niet meer worden gewijzigd.

trans-unit.resname: This sign-up list is for GEWIS members only, so you cannot add an external subscriber.
trans-unit.source: This sign-up list is for GEWIS members only, so you cannot add an external subscriber.
trans-unit.target: Deze inschrijflijst is alleen voor GEWIS-leden, dus je kunt geen externe inschrijver toevoegen.

trans-unit.resname: This sign-up list is not open, so you cannot add a subscriber.
trans-unit.source: This sign-up list is not open, so you cannot add a subscriber.
trans-unit.target: Deze inschrijflijst is niet open, dus je kunt geen inschrijver toevoegen.

trans-unit.resname: Too many requests. Please try again later.
trans-unit.source: Too many requests. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Te veel verzoeken. Probeer het later opnieuw.

trans-unit.resname: Too many sign-up attempts. Please try again later.
trans-unit.source: Too many sign-up attempts. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Te veel inschrijfpogingen. Probeer het later opnieuw.

trans-unit.resname: Try again once they are finished.
trans-unit.source: Try again once they are finished.
trans-unit.target: Probeer het opnieuw zodra zij klaar zijn.

trans-unit.resname: Un-cancel this activity? Sign-ups will reopen where the deadlines still allow.
trans-unit.source: Un-cancel this activity? Sign-ups will reopen where the deadlines still allow.
trans-unit.target: Annulering van deze activiteit ongedaan maken? Inschrijvingen gaan weer open waar de deadlines dat nog toelaten.

trans-unit.resname: Unpublish this activity? It is removed from public view entirely and all sign-up interaction is frozen.
trans-unit.source: Unpublish this activity? It is removed from public view entirely and all sign-up interaction is frozen.
trans-unit.target: Deze activiteit depubliceren? Ze wordt volledig uit de openbare weergave verwijderd en alle inschrijfinteractie wordt bevroren.

trans-unit.resname: Unpublished albums are only visible to the board.
trans-unit.source: Unpublished albums are only visible to the board.
trans-unit.target: Niet-gepubliceerde albums zijn alleen zichtbaar voor het bestuur.

trans-unit.resname: Visible to the organisers and the board. Use it to ask a question or leave a note.
trans-unit.source: Visible to the organisers and the board. Use it to ask a question or leave a note.
trans-unit.target: Zichtbaar voor de organisatoren en het bestuur. Gebruik dit om een vraag te stellen of een opmerking achter te laten.

trans-unit.resname: Vote for photo of the week
trans-unit.source: Vote for photo of the week
trans-unit.target: Stemmen voor foto van de week

trans-unit.resname: Waiting for the board to perform the draw.
trans-unit.source: Waiting for the board to perform the draw.
trans-unit.target: Wachten tot het bestuur de loting uitvoert.

trans-unit.resname: We found a pointer to NULL instead of this page
trans-unit.source: We found a pointer to NULL instead of this page
trans-unit.target: We hebben een verwijzing naar NULL gevonden in plaats van deze pagina

trans-unit.resname: Welcome to the website of study association GEWIS, the study association of the department of Mathematics & Computer Science at Eindhoven University of Technology.
trans-unit.source: Welcome to the website of study association GEWIS, the study association of the department of Mathematics & Computer Science at Eindhoven University of Technology.
trans-unit.target: Welkom op de website van studievereniging GEWIS, de studievereniging van de faculteit Wiskunde & Informatica aan de Technische Universiteit Eindhoven.

trans-unit.resname: When this is checked, GEFLITST will be notified that this activity needs a photographer.
trans-unit.source: When this is checked, GEFLITST will be notified that this activity needs a photographer.
trans-unit.target: Als dit is aangevinkt, wordt GEFLITST op de hoogte gesteld dat deze activiteit een fotograaf nodig heeft.

trans-unit.resname: When this is checked, the treasurer will be notified that this activity needs a Zettle.
trans-unit.source: When this is checked, the treasurer will be notified that this activity needs a Zettle.
trans-unit.target: Als dit is aangevinkt, wordt de penningmeester op de hoogte gesteld dat deze activiteit een Zettle nodig heeft.

trans-unit.resname: Which is basically the same thing.
trans-unit.source: Which is basically the same thing.

trans-unit.resname: You are about to reset multi-factor authentication for:
trans-unit.source: You are about to reset multi-factor authentication for:
trans-unit.target: Je staat op het punt om tweestapsverificatie te resetten voor:
Je doet je nu voor als %name% (%lidnr%)!

trans-unit.resname: You are currently using administrator privileges to use the website!
trans-unit.source: You are currently using administrator privileges to use the website!
trans-unit.target: Je gebruikt momenteel beheerdersprivileges om de website te gebruiken!

trans-unit.resname: You assumed it was here. It was not. Q.E.D.
trans-unit.source: You assumed it was here. It was not. Q.E.D.
trans-unit.target: Je ging ervan uit dat het hier was. Dat was niet zo. Q.E.D.

trans-unit.resname: You can also run it now.
trans-unit.source: You can also run it now.
trans-unit.target: Je kunt de loting ook nu uitvoeren.

trans-unit.resname: You can no longer view the sign-ups of this activity.
trans-unit.source: You can no longer view the sign-ups of this activity.
trans-unit.target: Je kunt de inschrijvingen van deze activiteit niet meer bekijken.

trans-unit.resname: You can still admit from the waiting list or remove a no-show until shortly after the activity.
trans-unit.source: You can still admit from the waiting list or remove a no-show until shortly after the activity.
trans-unit.target: Je kunt nog mensen van de wachtlijst toelaten of een no-show verwijderen tot kort na de activiteit.

trans-unit.resname: You cannot sign in to this account at this moment. Contact the board for more information.
trans-unit.source: You cannot sign in to this account at this moment. Contact the board for more information.
trans-unit.target: Je kunt je op dit moment niet aanmelden met dit account. Neem contact op met het bestuur voor meer informatie.

trans-unit.resname: You currently sign in with only a password. Adding MFA significantly reduces the risk of account takeover.
trans-unit.source: You currently sign in with only a password. Adding MFA significantly reduces the risk of account takeover.
trans-unit.target: Momenteel logt je alleen in met een wachtwoord. Door MFA toe te voegen, wordt het risico op accountmisbruik aanzienlijk verkleind.

trans-unit.resname: You do not have the required privileges to perform this action.
trans-unit.source: You do not have the required privileges to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt niet de vereiste rechten om deze actie uit te voeren.

trans-unit.resname: You have not been tagged in any photos yet.
trans-unit.source: You have not been tagged in any photos yet.
trans-unit.target: Je bent nog in geen enkele foto getagd.

trans-unit.resname: You have sent too many requests in a short period of time. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
trans-unit.source: You have sent too many requests in a short period of time. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt in korte tijd te veel verzoeken verzonden. Wacht een paar minuten voordat je het opnieuw probeert.

trans-unit.resname: You no longer hold the edit lock; it was taken over or expired. Reload the page to continue editing.
trans-unit.source: You no longer hold the edit lock; it was taken over or expired. Reload the page to continue editing.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt de bewerkingsvergrendeling niet meer; deze is overgenomen of verlopen. Herlaad de pagina om verder te bewerken.

trans-unit.resname: You tried to access memory outside the bounds of reality.
trans-unit.source: You tried to access memory outside the bounds of reality.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt geprobeerd om geheugen buiten de grenzen van de werkelijkheid te benaderen.

trans-unit.resname: Your edit session expired; reopen the activity and try again.
trans-unit.source: Your edit session expired; reopen the activity and try again.
trans-unit.target: Je bewerkingssessie is verlopen; open de activiteit opnieuw en probeer het nogmaals.

trans-unit.resname: Your message is being sent to %count% recipient(s).
trans-unit.source: Your message is being sent to %count% recipient(s).
trans-unit.target: Je bericht wordt verzonden naar %count% ontvanger(s).

trans-unit.resname: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
trans-unit.source: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
trans-unit.target: Je wachtwoord is opnieuw ingesteld. Je kunt je nu aanmelden met je nieuwe wachtwoord.

trans-unit.resname: Your password-reset link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
trans-unit.source: Your password-reset link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
trans-unit.target: De link om je wachtwoord opnieuw in te stellen is verlopen of is al gebruikt. Vraag een nieuwe aan.

trans-unit.resname: Your session was ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
trans-unit.source: Your session was ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
trans-unit.target: Je sessie is om veiligheidsredenen beëindigd. Log opnieuw in.

trans-unit.resname: Your sign-up is confirmed! We have emailed you a link to manage it.
trans-unit.source: Your sign-up is confirmed! We have emailed you a link to manage it.
trans-unit.target: Je aanmelding is bevestigd! We hebben je een e-mail gestuurd met een link om je account te beheren.

trans-unit.resname: Your sign-up will be visible to all visitors of the website once you confirm it via the email we send you.
trans-unit.source: Your sign-up will be visible to all visitors of the website once you confirm it via the email we send you.
trans-unit.target: Je aanmelding wordt zichtbaar voor alle bezoekers van de website zodra je deze hebt bevestigd via de e-mail die we je sturen.

trans-unit.resname: Your sign-up will be visible to other members and graduates.
trans-unit.source: Your sign-up will be visible to other members and graduates.
trans-unit.target: Je inschrijving is zichtbaar voor andere leden en afgestudeerden.

trans-unit.resname: ¹ Fields marked with this symbol are only shared with the board and the organiser of the activity.
trans-unit.source: ¹ Fields marked with this symbol are only shared with the board and the organiser of the activity.
trans-unit.target: ¹ Velden met dit symbool worden alleen gedeeld met het bestuur en de organisator van de activiteit.
